summary: BlackieFi 3.0 UI styling consistency testing complete. All 6 pages (Dashboard, Accounts, Goals, Debts, Investments, Assets) verified with modern tile styling, glass-morphism effects, and consistent gold/black luxury theme. All Add modals work correctly with proper styling.
critical_code_review_comments: tileStyles.js module provides excellent reusable styling with statGold, statRed, statGreen variants
All pages use consistent 4-column stats grid layout (except Accounts with 3 columns)
Modal styling is consistent across all pages with proper backdrop blur and gold accent lines
Debts page correctly uses red accent styling for the Add Debt button
All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: BlackieFi 3.0 UI styling update verified. All major pages (Dashboard, Accounts, Goals, Debts, Investments, Assets) now use consistent modern tile styling from shared tileStyles.js module. Key features: elevated 3D effects, glass-morphism, gold/red/green accent colors based on context. Debts page uses red accents, positive values use green, default uses gold. All Add modals have consistent styling with proper backdrop blur.

features: Add Debt modal with RED button
